name: Requirement Rewriter
description: Validate and rewrite BPR requirement statements against the RKT Writing Guide Do's and Don'ts rubric. Diagnoses violations, proposes rewrites, flags wrong-level and wrong-parent placement. The highest-frequency agent — run dozens of times per epic.
author: dropkit

input.arguments: requirement statements with parent sub-process name, parent business process name, and path to Ubiquitous Language document
